mapper.select:
select * from `book`
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into `book`(id, img, name, publishing, author) values (#{id}, #{img}, #{name}, #{publishing}, #{author})
mapper.update: update `book` set img = #{img}, name = #{name}, publishing = #{publishing}, author = #{author} where id = #{id}
